channel.title: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page
channel.description: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: A Second Killer? New Questions in the Idaho 4 Case
item.description: An update on the Idaho 4 case, examining recent developments and the questions surrounding the investigation, based on confirmed information and ongoing legal proceedings.

media:content.media:title: A Second Killer? New Questions in the Idaho 4 Case
media:content.media:description: An update on the Idaho 4 case, examining recent developments and the questions surrounding the investigation, based on confirmed information and ongoing legal proceedings.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: 6 of these 8 charges carry the possibility of life in prison in Michigan
item.description: In Michigan, an individual faces eight criminal charges, six of which carry the possibility of life in prison. The case is under investigation, and authorities are pursuing legal proceedings.

media:content.media:title: 6 of these 8 charges carry the possibility of life in prison in Michigan
media:content.media:description: In Michigan, an individual faces eight criminal charges, six of which carry the possibility of life in prison. The case is under investigation, and authorities are pursuing legal proceedings.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: She Reported Him… Then Everything Was Filmed
item.description: A woman reports an incident, and the events that follow are captured on video. The footage provides a clear, factual view of what unfolded while maintaining respect for those involved.

media:content.media:title: She Reported Him… Then Everything Was Filmed
media:content.media:description: A woman reports an incident, and the events that follow are captured on video. The footage provides a clear, factual view of what unfolded while maintaining respect for those involved.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Why did they do this to Jennifer?
item.description: A look into the circumstances surrounding Jennifer’s situation, presenting the facts and developments clearly while remaining respectful and factual for viewers.

media:content.media:title: Why did they do this to Jennifer?
media:content.media:description: A look into the circumstances surrounding Jennifer’s situation, presenting the facts and developments clearly while remaining respectful and factual for viewers.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Madeline Soto: Body Cam Footage and Inconsistencies
item.description: A factual overview of the Madeline Soto case, examining body cam footage, inconsistencies in the reports, and verified details from the investigation and legal proceedings.

media:content.media:title: Madeline Soto: Body Cam Footage and Inconsistencies
media:content.media:description: A factual overview of the Madeline Soto case, examining body cam footage, inconsistencies in the reports, and verified details from the investigation and legal proceedings.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: 6 months into his stay in jail, Denis was found dead in his jail cell.
item.description: A factual overview of the case in which Denis was found dead in his jail cell six months into his sentence, examining the timeline, official findings, and the response from authorities.

media:content.media:title: 6 months into his stay in jail, Denis was found dead in his jail cell.
media:content.media:description: A factual overview of the case in which Denis was found dead in his jail cell six months into his sentence, examining the timeline, official findings, and the response from authorities.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: How does someone do this to an 8 year old little girl?
item.description: A factual overview of a criminal case involving harm to an 8-year-old girl, outlining the investigation, charges, and court proceedings in a respectful and non‑sensational manner.

media:content.media:title: How does someone do this to an 8 year old little girl?
media:content.media:description: A factual overview of a criminal case involving harm to an 8-year-old girl, outlining the investigation, charges, and court proceedings in a respectful and non‑sensational manner.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page
